payload.answer: This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event (same event ID), so no new memory should be created from this retry.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans
repair_options: Treat as a duplicate event and ignore the retry.
If you want to be extra cautious, keep only the first occurrence and suppress later deliveries with the same event ID.
Review whether punctuation-only differences are causing duplicate detection issues, but do not create a second memory entry.
